creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
QtCurve qt4 theme version 1.8.6 fails to build on 8.2-RELEASE with latest ports.

Environment:

# gcc -v
Using built-in specs.
Target: amd64-undermydesk-freebsd
Configured with: FreeBSD/amd64 system compiler
Thread model: posix
gcc version 4.2.1 20070719  [FreeBSD]

# pkg_info | grep ^qt
qt-copy-3.3.8_12    Multiplatform C++ application framework (+ KDE patches)
qt4-corelib-4.7.3   Qt core library
qt4-dbus-4.7.3      Qt4 bindings for the D-BUS messaging system
qt4-gui-4.7.3       Qt graphical user interface library
qt4-moc-4.7.3       Qt meta object compiler
qt4-qmake-4.7.3     The build utility of the Qt project
qt4-rcc-4.7.3       Qt resource compiler
qt4-svg-4.7.3       Qt SVG library
qt4-uic-4.7.3       Qt user interface compiler
qt4-xml-4.7.3       Qt XML library

Also, x11-themes/qtcurve-gtk2 and x11-themes/qtcurve-kde3 built successfully for me.

How-To-Repeat: Update ports on 8.2-RELEASE to latest version by portsnap, then try to build x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4, you will get the following errors:

In file included from /usr/local/include/qgdict.h:42,
                 from /usr/local/include/qasciidict.h:42,
                 from /usr/local/include/qapplication.h:43,
                 from /usr/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6/common/common.h:51,
                 from /usr/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6/style/qtcurve.h:39,
                 from /usr/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6/style/windowmanager.cpp:35:
/usr/local/include/qptrcollection.h:49: error: function definition does not declare parameters

In file included from /usr/local/include/qasciidict.h:42,
                 from /usr/local/include/qapplication.h:43,
                 from /usr/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6/common/common.h:51,
                 from /usr/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6/style/qtcurve.h:39,
                 from /usr/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6/style/windowmanager.cpp:35:
/usr/local/include/qgdict.h:53: error: 'QPtrCollection' has not been declared
/usr/local/include/qgdict.h:53: error: ISO C++ forbids declaration of 'Item' with no type
/usr/local/include/qgdict.h:53: error: expected ';' before 'getData'
/usr/local/include/qgdict.h:54: error: expected `;' before 'QPtrCollection'
/usr/local/include/qgdict.h:54: error: 'QPtrCollection' has not been declared

/usr/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6/style/windowmanager.cpp:750: error: 'qApp' was not declared in this scope
/usr/local/include/qptrlist.h: In copy constructor 'QPtrList<type>::QPtrList(const QPtrList<type>&) [with type = QGraphicsItem*]':
/usr/local/include/qt4/QtGui/qgraphicsscene.h:174:   instantiated from here
/usr/local/include/qptrlist.h:69: error: type 'QGList' is not a direct base of 'QPtrList<QGraphicsItem*>'
*** Error code 1

Stop in /tmp/obj/mnt/garbage/build/ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/work/QtCurve-KDE4-1.8.6.

You will receive messages about 100 errors totally.
